metric_value: Leader in 10Base-T stackable hubs, high-speed hubs, NICs, and network printers

metric_value: Scalable 10/100 Mbps; shared and switched configurations; supported by HP

metric_value: Market success in both Windows and Unix versions; backed by exemplary service and support

metric_value: Timing is right for HP's approach; workgroup-ready networking solutions will define next purchase wave

metric_value: 100VG lost to 100Base-T as dominant fast Ethernet standard; 100Base-T became universal by late 1990s
notes: HP's 100VG backing was a losing bet; 100Base-T (IEEE 802.3u) dominated the market.

metric_value: HP Workgroup Networks Division reorganized; ProCurve brand emerged for HP networking; HPE later acquired Aruba (2015) and Juniper (2025)

notes: Aberdeen's market timing prediction proved broadly correct.
